Frequently Asked Questions

Yes! This is a legitimate promotional survey offer. Simply complete the required steps to receive your Wingstop Ranch Money gift card reward.
Your Ranch Money gift card is valid for in-store and online Wingstop orders including delivery. Check your reward email for full details on accepted locations and ordering methods.
After completing all required steps, your $500 Wingstop gift card code will be sent directly to the email address you provided — usually within 24–48 hours.
Deals include free trials, app downloads, and short surveys from our partners. You choose which ones work best for you — typically 4–6 are required to unlock your reward.
Expiration terms are included in your reward email. We recommend using your Ranch Money gift card within 12 months of receiving it.
